proof:
use (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)
      have step1 : (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M) = M ◁ (M ◁ (M ∘ M)) := composition M M
      have step2 : M ◁ (M ∘ M) = (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M) := M.call (M ∘ M)
      have step3 : (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M) = M ◁ ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) := 
        step1.trans (congrArg (fun x => M ◁ x) step2)
      have step4 : M ◁ ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) = ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) ◁ ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) := 
        M.call ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M))
      exact step4.symm.trans step3.symm
successful_attempts:
use (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)
      have step1 : (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M) = M ◁ (M ◁ (M ∘ M)) := composition M M
      have step2 : M ◁ (M ∘ M) = (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M) := M.call (M ∘ M)
      have step3 : (M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M) = M ◁ ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) := 
        step1.trans (congrArg (fun x => M ◁ x) step2)
      have step4 : M ◁ ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) = ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) ◁ ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M)) := 
        M.call ((M ∘ M) ◁ (M ∘ M))
      exact step4.symm.trans step3.symm
